calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To S/A Entry Of Default And Default Judgment; Memorandum Of P/A In Support Thereof; Declarations Of Garry Barbaree; Don Jones, David Ofahengaue, Diane Knudsen; Jane Schlager, Kenneth A. Holland, Esq., And Joshua D. Meier, Esq.; Request For Judicial Notice; (Proposed) Answer; (Proposed) Order
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendant and moving party Hamilton United Methodist Church's Motion to Set Aside Entry of Default and Default Judgment.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Milton Katz, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Anau Pulete and David Pulete, who were not present at today's hearing.
Kenneth A. Holland, Esq. appeared for defendant and moving party Hamilton United Methodist Church.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, defendant Hamilton United Methodist Church's Motion to Set Aside Entry of Default and Default Judgment is GRANTED.
The default entered May 6, 2008, and the Court Judgment entered July 29, 2008, are hereby SET ASIDE.
Mr. Katz is awarded attorney's fees, in an amount to be determined, for preparation of his opposition to plaintiff's motion to set aside entry of default and default judgment.

Counsel for defendant Hamilton United Methodist Church shall submit a proposed order to the Court no later than March 16, 2009.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Milton Katz, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Anau Pulette, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Hamilton Unitied Methodist Church.
Default entered against defendan on May 6, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 21, 2008.
Plaintiff David Pulete was dismissed from this action on May 21, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Anau Pulete, and against the Defaulted Defendant Hamilton Unitid Methodist Church as follows:

Damages/Principal - $186,206.00
Costs - $467.95, for a total of $186,673.95.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Continued To Jul-29-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Milton Katz, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Anau Pulete, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the from Mr. Katz, the Court continued the matter to July 29, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. for proof of medical and billing records missing from the memo. in support of default judgment received in court today.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
